Event: Unknowable Adventure
Event Date: 04/12/2025
Sage Bot Item Code: E63
Voice from Beyond Engraving

Enhancement: 1
Every once in a while during 3 sec, when attacking, the fighter throws a grenade at a random enemy fighter. Upon hitting, the grenade deals 74100 / 105800 / 151200 / 201600 / 252000 / 315000 / 400000 magic damage to the target and all enemy fighters within a small radius.

Enhancement: 2
12000 Crit from the gems
Every once in a while, during 4 seconds, when attacking, the fighter throws a grenade at a random enemy fighter. Upon impact, the grenade deals 112900 / 161300 / 230400 / 307200 / 384000 / 480000 / 600000 pure damage to the target and all enemy fighters in a small radius around them, and removes 3 random positive effects from them.

Enhancement: 3
25000 Crit from the gems
Every once in a while during 5 sec., when attacking, the fighter throws a grenade at a random enemy fighter. Upon hitting, the grenade deals 150500 / 215000 / 307200 / 409600 / 512000 / 640000 / 800000 pure damage to the target and all enemy fighters in a small radius around it and removes all positive effects from them.
